scripts.build: npm --prefix cloudflare install --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix cloudflare run build
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=automatic-posting
scripts.cf:r2:create: npx wrangler r2 bucket create automatic-posting-assets
scripts.cf:secret:admin: npx wrangler pages secret put ADMIN_SETUP_KEY --project-name=automatic-posting
scripts.cf:secret:token: npx wrangler pages secret put TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY --project-name=automatic-posting
